creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Pushed together with 5.1.0 update (non-major are non-breaking according to "semantic versioning").

(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #1)
> (possibly with PORTREVISION bumps).

No static library, ABI is compatible and new API is unlikely to be used so soon. I guess, you meant to reset PORTREVISION in harfbuzz-icu.
